chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding a Woman Whose Husband Prevents Her From Performing the Obligatory Hajj or a Voluntary Hajj

text: 2908 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَلرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «تَحُجُّ وَ إِنْ رَغِمَ أَنْفُهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2908 - In a narration from Abdul-Rahman ibn Abi Abdullah, from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as),
Imam (as) said: "She should perform Hajj, even if it displeases him."
